messages.content:

definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading “游戏内容与系统” (Game Content and Systems) and contains no substantive text. It cannot answer specific questions regarding topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It functions only as a structural marker indicating that the broader document may cover game mechanics, features, or system architecture, but no retrievable facts or details are present in this excerpt.
